title: Brewing Tea Tales
description: Prepare for tea time! With new foods and drinks for your special moment!!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af8454afa2d64b022aa1806c2fb67402da96ccb9.webp)
### 🌿Prepare for tea time!! With new foods and drinks for your special moment!!🌿

Perfect for tea lovers! This mod introduces a wide variety of delicious teas to enrich special survival experience and add a warm and cozy touch to your Minecraft adventures. Whether you prefer a classic black tea, a comforting green tea, or a fun bubble tea, we have something for everyone!

## 🍹 Key Features: 

- New Drinks and Food: Enjoy delicious drinks like Boba Tea and more! Each drink comes with unique effects. 
- Special Effects: Drinks will not only satisfy your hunger, but also grant you benefits like Absorption, Regeneration, or other buffs.
- Dynamic Systems: By consuming certain drinks, you'll receive reusable items, like Glass Mugs, ready for another use.
- Custom Crafting Recipes: Discover how to create all the mod's delicacies with new easy-to-learn recipes.







## 🎨 Upcoming updates:
- More drinks, food, and unique mechanics.
- Compatibility with other cooking and adventure mods.
- Visual improvements for glasses, bottles, and more.
